name: idea-script-generation-fused
description: Generate ideas + scripts in single workflow (fused creation + script)

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $input.first().json;
return Array.from({ length: input.ideaCount }).map((_, index) => ({ json: { ...input, iteration: index + 1, ideaIndex: index } }));

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: 'llama-3.1-8b-instant', temperature: 0.7, max_tokens: 100, messages: [ { role: 'user', content: 'Generate exactly one unique TikTok content idea for category: ' + $json.category + '. Return only the idea text, no numbering.' } ] } }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ category: $json.category, topic: $json.topic, status: 'new', pipelineStatus: 'idea_created', publishStatus: 'draft', platform: 'tiktok', templateId: $json.templateId || null, tiktokAccountOpenId: $json.tiktokAccountOpenId || null }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', temperature: 0.6, max_tokens: 500, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are a TikTok content expert. Generate professional, punchy scripts optimized for mobile. Return ONLY valid JSON without markdown.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Category: ' + $json.category + '
Topic: ' + $json.topic + '

Generate a professional TikTok script:
- script: 1-3 short impactful sentences, natural French, conversational
- caption: 1-2 catchy phrases with 2-3 relevant hashtags
- hook: engaging first phrase to hook in 1s
- background_keyword: single word for background search

Return exactly this JSON:
{"script":"...","caption":"...","hook":"...","background_keyword":"..."}' } ] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ scripts: $json.script, script_status: 'done', script_hook: $json.hook, caption: $json.caption, background_keyword: $json.background_keyword, pipeline_status: 'script_ready', llm_model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile' }) }}
